title: Arctic (and Antarctic!) Sea Ice Extent: August 17, 2023
summary: August 17 2023: Over the past week, the sea ice had a decrease , since last week, by a lower rate of 8.65% , from the level on 08/10/2023 of 5.957 M km 2 to 5.442 M km 2 for this week. Plot Compiled by: Howard J. Diamond, PhD; Climate Science Program Manager at NOAA’s Air Resources Laboratory Data S...
